description_for_human: Browse, preview, and apply 100+ community-built themes for Codex.
description_for_model: DexThemes is a theme gallery for Codex by OpenAI. Use this plugin to browse themes, get theme colors, generate random themes, and provide deep links for users to apply themes. The /api/themes endpoint returns the full catalog as JSON. The /api/color-me-lucky endpoint generates random harmonious themes. Each theme has dark and/or light variants with colors: surface, ink, accent, sidebar, codeBg, diffAdded, diffRemoved, skill, contrast. To apply a theme, direct users to https://dexthemes.com/?theme={id}&variant={dark|light}.
